name: atlassian-marketplace-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server exposing the Atlassian Marketplace vendor APIs (v3 reporting + v1 promotions) as 95 LLM-callable tools — licenses, transactions, promotions, reviews, churn/conversion metrics, customer insights, app listings, privacy/security, and more.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: ATLASSIAN_EMAIL=unit@test ATLASSIAN_API_TOKEN=unit-token MARKETPLACE_DEVELOPER_ID=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 MARKETPLACE_PARTNER_ID=0 vitest run tests/unit
scripts.docs:all: npm run build && npm run docs:tsdoc && npm run build && npm run docs:tools && npm run docs:tool-pages && npm run docs:api && npm run docs:verify-links
